title: tephroseris rivularis
intro: Tephroseris rivularis, also known as the mountain everlast or tephroseris, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris rivularis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and improving wound healing due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Tephroseris rivularis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
